name: Bayonetta
description: PlatinumGames’ universally acclaimed action masterpiece finally comes to PC. Experience the over-the-top stylish action in 60fps at unlocked HD resolutions. The definitive way to play: being bad never felt so good.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 (8.1)/ 10
  • Processor: Core i3 3220
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Radeon HD6950 / GeForce GTX 570 (VRAM 768MB)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Microsoft no longer supports Windows 10 or older versions
comment1: Extravagant, charming, sparkling and sexy: Bayonetta is a marvel of style, fun and class.
comment2: Fanstastic game, all the characters and enemies are very memorable. They have poured in soo much charm and personality in Bayonetta, every moment is a cinematic experience. Gameplay is super fun, lots of combo potential with unique enemy designs. Hard mode is very challenging with altered enemy placement  and new items to try , so lots of things to experience after finishing the first playthrough. All in all a 10/10 game, worth getting even after nine years.
comment3: I had fun, Bayonetta is really over the top with its fights and cut scenes lol. I found it best playing with a controller (I used the steam controller to play the game).
